Leveraging AI: Practical Applications for Business - This course focuses on how businesses can leverage artificial intelligence (AI) to drive innovation, improve decision-making, and enhance operational efficiency. Through practical applications, students will gain hands-on experience with AI tools and technologies learning how to integrate them across key business functions like marketing, finance, operations, and human resources.
